title: Milktopia Queso Fritters
description: Crispy fritters filled with a creamy milktopia and queso mixture, perfect as a snack or appetizer.
instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (180°C).
In a large bowl, mix together the milktopia and queso until smooth.
Add the flour, eggs, and bread crumbs to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the dough into the hot oil.
Fry the fritters for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Drain the fritters on paper towels and sprinkle with salt.
